headline: Woman's Left Ear Hears Better Than Right Ear, They've Started A 'Communication Committee'
summary: The left ear translates for the right ear. They have weekly meetings.
fullBody: Amanda McEars has discovered her left ear is 'more attentive' than her right ear. 'They don't always agree on what they hear,' Amanda said. 'It's a communication issue.' Her ears now have a 'communication committee' with weekly meetings. The left ear takes notes. The right ear 'participates enthusiastically.' Amanda is now 'turning her head' to improve inter-ear communication.
